description: Perform a page speed and resource size audit for the online bookstore 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. Export the crawl data for internal HTML pages to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', ensuring the export includes Address, Status Code, Response Time, Size, and Word Count. Based on this data, create a summary report of at least 400 characters at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/performance_report.txt'. The report must include the total number of HTML pages scanned, the average response time, a list of the 5 slowest pages, a list of the 5 largest pages, and at least 3 specific recommendations to improve performance.
